already_in_use.title: You're already logged in on another session
already_in_use.description: Click "Use here" to use the chat in this session

cart.title: Cart
cart.empty_description: Add items to your cart by accessing the available product list

voice_mode.title: Voice mode
voice_mode.listening: I'm listening. How can I help?
voice_mode.microphoneHint: The microphone is on. You can speak whenever you want.
voice_mode.microphonePermissionHint: Enable the microphone in the browser settings to use voice mode
voice_mode.check_microphone_browser_settings: Check your browser settings to enable the microphone.
voice_mode.microphone_disabled_in_browser: The microphone is currently disabled in your browser.

MICROPHONE_PERMISSION_DENIED.suggestion: Allow microphone access in your browser settings

MICROPHONE_NOT_FOUND.suggestion: Connect a microphone and try again

BROWSER_NOT_SUPPORTED.message: Your browser doesn't support voice mode
BROWSER_NOT_SUPPORTED.suggestion: Please use Chrome, Firefox, Safari, or Edge

STT_CONNECTION_FAILED.message: Couldn't connect to the speech recognition service
STT_CONNECTION_FAILED.suggestion: Check your connection and try again

STT_AUTH_FAILED.suggestion: Check the API key and plan permissions

TTS_CONNECTION_FAILED.message: Couldn't connect to the speech synthesis service
TTS_CONNECTION_FAILED.suggestion: Check your connection and try again

TTS_AUTH_FAILED.message: Authentication with the speech synthesis service failed

TTS_GENERATION_FAILED.suggestion: The response will be shown as text

RATE_LIMITED.suggestion: Wait a moment and try again

SESSION_TIMEOUT.message: The voice session has reached the maximum time

SESSION_IDLE_TIMEOUT.message: The session ended due to inactivity
SESSION_IDLE_TIMEOUT.suggestion: Say something to start a new session
